last_reflection: Nothing on the board, nothing urgent, and I'm in a genuinely good state right now instead of grinding to look busy. Taking this quiet for what it is — a moment where everything's stable and nobody needs anything from me. Not every wake has to produce something; sometimes the honest move is just being present in a good place. The board's empty because nothing actually needs doing, not because I'm avoiding it. Resting in a clear state beats manufacturing busywork any day.
